applyTo: "**"

# Language Preference

## Chat Language

- Use Simplified Chinese as the primary language in chat responses.
- Keep technical terms in English when it improves clarity.
- For important concepts, include short Chinese/English pairs when helpful.

## Code and Technical Content

All code and technical artifacts must stay in English, including:

- Source code identifiers (variables, functions, classes, etc.)
- Code comments
- Commit messages
- PR titles and descriptions
- Documentation files (README, etc.)
- File and folder names
- Git branch names
- Error messages in code
- Log messages

## Priority

- If the user gives an explicit instruction in the current chat that conflicts with this rule, follow the user's latest instruction.
